title: RadioCraft Mod
description: Bring your world in Minecraft to life with your own music. RadioCraft adds a fully interactive radio block that allows players to play custom audio directly inside the game using external sources.
body:
_**🇺🇸 English**_

RadioCraft – Play your own music in Minecraft

Adds a radio block that allows you to play custom audio using external URLs.

Radio block
URL audio support

⚠️ **Disclaimer**

This mod does not provide or include any audio content.

All audio played through this mod is sourced from external URLs provided by the user.
Users are fully responsible for the content they choose to access and use.

________________________________________________________________________________________


**🇪🇸 Español**

RadioCraft – Reproduce tu propia música en Minecraft

Agrega un bloque de radio que permite reproducir audio personalizado mediante URLs externas.

Bloque de radio
Soporte para enlaces de audio

⚠️ **Aviso**

Este mod no proporciona ni incluye contenido de audio.

Todo el audio reproducido proviene de enlaces externos proporcionados por el usuario.
El usuario es completamente responsable del contenido que decide utilizar.
